name: Zoog

sections.name: Zoogs Vs. Cats

link.alt: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 192
link.name: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 192

sections.text: Zoogs and cats have a storied hatred, though neither side can remember the original cause. Zoogs have been known to prey on kittens, but their courage fails quickly when confronted by a full-grown cat. Cats, on the other hand, are always quick to pounce, chase, and attack zoogs on sight.

link.alt: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 192
link.name: Pathfinder #200: Seven Dooms for Sandpoint pg. 192

text: Furry, tentacle-snouted, and prone to chittering, zoogs dwell in the shadowy parts of the world where dreams have an uncanny knack for coming true. They typically gather in small families, and while zoogs normally eat fungi and plants, some have developed a taste for sentient beings.
